articles.title: Body of man, 22, pulled from river after ‘getting into difficulty’ during heatwave

Cops launched a frantic search for Brody Leach after he "got into difficulty in the water" early yesterday morning. The young man was seen swimming in the River Severn in Shrewsbury around 4.10am yesterday....

articles.title: MAGA Fanatic Accused of Twisted Sex Acts at Trump’s ‘State Fair’
articles.description: Evan Vucci / Evan Vucci/Reuters A MAGA supporter dressed as Uncle Sam was arrested at Donald Trump’s Great American State Fair after police alleged he committed a lewd act. Police documents reviewed by the Daily Beast show that Gian Rachtelli, 54, was charged with lewd, indecent, and obscene acts after three separate witnesses told police they observed what appeared to be a sexual act while watching a troupe of female acrobats perform. Read more at The Daily Beast.

articles.title: Over 100 dogs found dead, many with bullet holes at Northern California rescue, authorities say
articles.description: Investigators recovered 117 intact canine remains, 21 canine skulls and hundreds of additional bones during a second search of a Northern California animal rescue property. Inside a barn on the property, investigators said they discovered an area they believe was likely used to kill dogs. More than 600 dog collars were also recovered from that location.
